_note: Sourced guides only - never invent guide steps. All guides below are summarized from the GhazzyTV crafting guide video the owner provided (transcript supplied 2026-07-05). Community content, not official.

video.title: PoE2 Crafting Guide - from basics to profit crafting

guides.title: Item anatomy: item level, bases, and mod weights
guides.goal: Understand what can roll on an item before spending currency
steps: Hover an item and hold ALT to see its ITEM LEVEL (not the required level - item level dictates which modifier tiers can roll).

Check the base type: evasion bases roll evasion mods, energy shield bases roll ES mods, armour bases roll armour mods; hybrid bases can roll both plus hybrid versions. Suffixes are mostly the same across bases.

Use the Craft view / Modifier Explorer (or craftofexile.com) with your item level set: any modifier whose required ilvl is higher than your item CANNOT roll (e.g. ilvl 76 sceptre cannot roll +4 minion skills; 78+ can; T1 spirit needs 82).
Weights are your odds: a 1000-weight mana roll is far more likely than a 50-weight T1 spirit roll. High-value mods are usually low weight.

guides.title: Greater / Perfect currency: minimum modifier level
guides.goal: Use upgraded orbs to block low tiers
steps: Greater orbs (Transmutation/Augmentation/Exalted...) add 'minimum modifier level 44': tiers requiring ilvl 43 or lower can no longer roll, so hits skew to higher tiers.
Perfect orbs raise that to minimum modifier level 70 - but they also block any mod whose top tiers sit below ilvl 70 (e.g. flat life on some bases can stop rolling entirely).
Weights still apply within the remaining pool - a Greater Augmentation on a ring is still most likely to hit mana, just at a better tier.

guides.title: Budget ring craft: guarantee life with an Essence
guides.goal: Cheap early-endgame rare with guaranteed life
steps: Start from a magic ring with one useful suffix (e.g. a resistance) and an open prefix.
Orb of Augmentation to fill the prefix (or Greater if you can afford it).
Use an Essence of the Body: on ring/amulet/boots/gloves it makes the item RARE and guarantees 70-84 life. (An essence cannot be used if the item already has a mod of that type.)
Essences of this tier are very cheap (a few exalted) - great value per guaranteed mod.
Fill the remaining open affixes with Exalted Orb slams (attributes/resists are suffixes, so once suffixes fill, the next exalt is guaranteed to add a prefix).
Price check the result before using it - decent resist/attribute rings sell.

guides.title: Boots rule: movement speed or don't bother
guides.goal: Avoid wasting currency on dead boots
steps: Movement speed is the single most important boots modifier.
If boots already have a crafted mod and no movement speed, an exalt slam is a pure gamble to hit it; a Chaos Orb removes a random mod and adds a random one - also a gamble.
GhazzyTV's advice: don't craft on boots without movement speed already on them.

guides.title: Minion sceptre craft (+4 minion skills base)
guides.goal: High-value minion weapon without praying for the 100-weight roll
steps: BUY a magic base that already has '+4 to Level of all Minion Skills' (weight ~100, ilvl 78+ required) instead of trying to hit it yourself.
Use a Perfect Orb of Augmentation for the second magic prefix (highest tiers only).
Use a Greater Essence of Command to go rare with guaranteed 'Allies in your Presence deal 75-89% increased Damage'.
Desecrate with a Preserved Jawbone + Omen of Dextral Necromancy so the desecrated mod is guaranteed a SUFFIX (with an open slot it adds without removing).
Use an Omen of Greater Exaltation + one Greater Exalted Orb: adds TWO modifiers at once (often cheaper than two separate greater exalts).
Reveal the desecrated mod at the Well of Souls and pick crit damage / attack speed / cast speed depending on the buyer's build.
Price check against listed +4 sceptres before selling.

guides.title: Perfect Essences, Distilled Emotions, and Alloys
steps: Perfect Essences act like a Chaos Orb with a guaranteed outcome: REMOVE a random mod, then ADD the guaranteed essence mod. If the guaranteed mod is a prefix and all prefixes are full, it must remove a prefix - use that to protect suffixes.

Distilled Emotions (since 0.5) work like perfect essences for JEWELS (e.g. Diluted Liquid Iron on a sapphire jewel: remove one random mod, guarantee %ES). A cheap jewel can jump in value massively with the right third mod.
Alloys work the same way on rares with base-specific guaranteed mods (Runic Alloy: runic ward mods by slot; Mystic Alloy: AoE on helmet/gloves, spirit on boots).

guides.title: Advanced: fracture + omen metacrafting (the minion belt)
guides.goal: Lock the key mod, then re-roll everything else safely
steps: A Fracturing Orb locks one random modifier forever on a rare with 4+ mods - a fractured mod survives Chaos and Annulment orbs.
Trick: fracture BEFORE revealing a desecrated mod - unrevealed desecrated mods cannot be fractured, so the fracture odds improve (1 in 3 instead of 1 in 4 in the video's example).
With the key mod fractured (e.g. +2 minion skills), you can Annul freely: failures only remove unlocked mods.

Use Omen of Dextral/Sinistral Necromancy to force desecration onto the affix side you want; Altered Collarbones give access to Otherworldly (breach-exclusive) desecrated mods like Minion Strikes Melee Splash.

Omen of Light + Annulment removes a desecrated mod specifically (expensive); Omen of Whittling makes a Chaos Orb remove the LOWEST-level modifier; combine with Sinistral/Dextral Erasure to restrict it to one affix side.
This tier of crafting is EXPENSIVE (collarbones ~98ex, whittling ~188ex in the video's market) - know your exit price first.

guides.title: Endgame gambles: corruption and sanctification
steps: Vaal Orb corruption (and double corruption) can add crazy mods (e.g. +level of all minion skills) or brick the item.

Omen of Sanctification + Divine Orb 'sanctifies': every mod value is multiplied by 78%-122% at random and the item becomes PERMANENTLY unmodifiable - this is how +4 sceptres become +5. Always the LAST step.
Anticore locks let you preview the next currency outcome before committing (~110 divines per try - mirror-tier crafting only).

guides.title: Profit crafting 101 (economy, not recipes)
steps: No one can tell you WHAT to craft - a published profit craft stops being profitable (economy 101).

Use poe.ninja > Builds > current league: see the most-played classes, ctrl-click several top players, and look for the RARE items they share in common (e.g. hybrid evasion/ES boots with deflection + resists; movement speed optional for some builds).
Buy a base that already has the hardest mod (e.g. +4 minion sceptre for ~12-14 div) - the base is your static cost.
Add the cheap guaranteed steps first (essence ~1ex), then targeted desecration with omens, then exalt/greater-exalt fills.
Price check honestly against listed items before and after - the video's own example roughly broke even, which is normal while learning.
The real payoff of learning to craft: recognizing valuable dropped bases (e.g. double-socket +4 sceptre) on the ground.

guides.title: Kolr's Hunt / Marksman Projectile Gloves
best_for: Twister-like projectile builds if scaling projectile skills
base_requirements: Open augment socket or Kolr's Hunt already socketed
target_mods: Surpassing chance to fire an additional Projectile
steps: Buy/prepare non-corrupted ilvl 82+ gloves.
Socket Kolr's Hunt to enable Marksman modifier pool.
Make rare and reduce junk mods; transcript moved toward a one-mod state before chaos spam.
Chaos spam/fish until the key Marksman projectile mod appears.
Add prefixes; prioritize projectile damage, added physical, added lightning/cold.
If a bad prefix appears, prefer Omen of Sinistral Annulment + Orb of Annulment for clean prefix-only removal; prefix-only Chaos is not clean deletion.
Keep good damage rolls; consider Fracturing Orb only once the item has enough value.
Use Omen of Dextral Necromancy to make next Desecration add only suffixes.
Use Omen of Abyssal Echoes to reroll revealed Desecrated options once while fishing for additional projectile chance.
Use Omen of Light + Orb of Annulment to remove bad Desecrated mods and repeat if budget allows.
Finish prefixes with Greater/Perfect Exalted slams; stop once the item is strong enough.
stop_conditions: Key projectile mod hit + acceptable suffixes
Additional projectile chance hit even if tier is not perfect
Fractured useful mod and final prefixes acceptable
mistakes_to_warn: Prefix-only Chaos does not equal clean prefix deletion.
Transcript prices are stale and should not be hard-coded.
Exact final mod text needs screenshot/trade verification.
Do not treat as guaranteed recipe.
guides.goal: Craft Kolr's Hunt / Marksman Projectile Gloves
